title: Make logo text full blue

requirements.text: Update the logo text in SiteHeader.tsx to display in a solid, full blue color instead of its current styling. Apply the same change to any logo text in SiteFooter.tsx.
acceptanceCriteria: The logo text in the site header is rendered in a full/solid blue color
The logo text in the site footer (if present) matches the same full blue color
No other header or footer elements change color
The blue color is consistent with the existing blue palette defined in the Tailwind config / CSS tokens

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui/
Use the existing blue color tokens already defined in the Tailwind config or index.css rather than introducing new color values
nonGoals: Changing any other text or element colors
Redesigning the header or footer layout
